subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. There is not now opportunity for a detailed reply. Consider thou from the day of departure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید فرصت جواب مفصل نیست ملاحظه نما از یوم خروج از
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
